commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh He that dies of Ahab in the city the dogs shall eat; and he that dies in the field shall the fowls of the air eat. Yet God remitted something from the severity of this sentence; and Achab was buried in Samaria, chap. But his son was deprived of burial. (Tirinus) (4 Kings ix. ) According to the Hebrew, the prediction related to Achab's posterity, as the Chaldean, Septuagint, Syriac, have understood it. (Calmet) Protestants, "him that dieth of Achab in the city".
